# Bayour - Official Artist Site

> Bayour (Ismail Abdulrasheed) is a Nigerian Afrobeats and R&B artist from the Yoruba southwest, born between Ogbomosho and Ilesa, Nigeria.

## About
Bayour makes melody-first, rhythm-obsessed music rooted in heartbreak, loneliness, faith, and emotional honesty. His sound blends Afrobeats, R&B, and Afropop.

## Music
- Passion (Single, 2025) feat. Mailjelly - https://open.spotify.com/track/1J0ggvhnYHafhsI1sxWP20
- R.T.T.A.F (EP, 2024) - https://open.spotify.com/album/3LlCe1qTWNFmJe4VaPuHF6
  - Romantic Turned to a Fxckboi
  - The One
  - Steadily
